title: Pure Comforting Jamaican Mozzarella Tagine
description: A cultured and silky Jamaican dish featuring mozzarella, cooked in a tagine with a blend of spices, perfect for a comforting meal. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced scotch bonnet pepper and cook for another minute, stirring occasionally.
Add the thyme sprigs, allspice, and tagine spice blend, and stir to combine.
Add the shredded mozzarella cheese and stir until it is well coated with the spice mixture.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the oven, where it will cook at 300 degrees for 20 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and season the cheese with sea salt to taste.
Serve the mozzarella hot, garnished with additional thyme sprigs if desired.
